assistant_policy: Assistant-only candidates are assistant_origin=true and cannot be confirmed user decisions or facts without user evidence.
project_candidate_rule: Project candidates require at least two signals among intended outcome, continuing work, actions/tasks, artifact/output, resources/research, decisions/constraints, repeated appearance, or identifiable state.
redaction_policy: Use Stage 3 redacted source-unit text only; review snippets remain short.
selection_method: Deterministic metadata diversity: complexity buckets first by timestamp spread and packet eligibility, then project-document packets, then attachment-centered packets. No topic cherry-picking.
